x-enumeration-literals.name: Location is Residential Address of Party
x-enumeration-literals.description: Location from which the affairs of a company are directed or location in which a person resides (the place of a person's home). ISO20022

x-enumeration-literals.name: Location is Domicile Address of Party
x-enumeration-literals.description: Location in which a person is permanently domiciled (the place of a person's permanent home). ISO20022

x-enumeration-literals.name: Location is Place of Birth of Party
Location is Work Address of Party
Location is Delivery Point Address of Party
Location is owned by Party
x-enumeration-literals.description: Registered owner or title holder(s) of the property.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Party is Alliance Partner of Location
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Reference to the bank alliance partner with some kind of link association to the location (used for location based marketing).
The Location considers the Party to be a trusted partner with whom it has an established alliancethis could involve cooperation in operations, services, strategy, or other agreed areas.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Location is Contact Point Address of Party
Location is Geografical Address of Party
Location is Telephonic Address of Party
x-enumeration-literals.description: A telephonic address refers to a phone number (including landline, mobile, or fax) used for voice or text communication

x-enumeration-literals.name: Location is Electronic Address of Party
x-enumeration-literals.description: An electronic address typically refers to digital contact identifiers, most commonly an email address
